race.comment: ROYAL BOTANIC (10) has been about the mark at all four runs to date, the latest over 1400m at Newcastle where she loomed to win but didn't quite finish it off. Best performance was three back when runner-up over today's journey at Newcastle under 1kg more. Beautifully placed back in a country maiden and looks all set to grab a well-deserved win. SERIOUS JEWEL (11) raced handy then battled on just fairly for fourth recently over 1300m at Scone. Has only been to the races twice so this two-year-old has more to offer. AIRBURST (7) resumes. Switched to the Paul Snowden yard at the end of last prep and ran a nice second here at this distance. Should return in good order. COOL ZOUSAIN (3) has found the line well in his two runs to date and will enjoy the step up in distance today. HABIB ALBI (4) returned from a spell with a cheeky effort at Port Macquarie last start. Cannot be ruled out on a nine-day back-up.
